login.sentTo: We sent a login link to
login.codePrompt: Or enter the 6-digit code from the email
login.recoveryDesc: Import key shares to use your wallet without server
login.inAppBrowserDesc: For the best experience, open this page in your default browser.

wallet.welcomeDesc: Create your first wallet to send, receive, and manage crypto across multiple chains.
wallet.selfCustodyDesc: You hold both key shares and can recover your wallet without our server.
wallet.secureKeyGenDesc: Your key is split between this device and our server — neither side can sign alone
wallet.passkeyProtectionDesc: Use your fingerprint, face, or PIN to authorize transactions — no passwords needed
wallet.fraudProtectionDesc: Risky addresses are automatically flagged before you send

config.title: Settings
config.description: Customize networks, preferences, and RPC endpoints. Changes apply instantly.
config.expertModeDesc: Show advanced transaction controls, raw data, and detailed logs
config.confirmBeforeBroadcastDesc: Review signed transaction before sending to the network
config.evmGasBufferDesc: Extra gas added to estimates for ETH/ERC-20 transactions
config.refreshIntervalDesc: How often balances and prices update
config.defaultChainsDesc: Chains shown by default for new accounts
config.exportConfigDesc: Download, copy, or email your overrides
config.previewMergedDesc: Preview merged config — verify before saving
config.invalidJsonGoBack: Invalid JSON — go back to fix

recovery.banner: Recovery mode — your wallet keys are loaded in this browser
recovery.bannerDesc: Your two key files have been combined and loaded locally. You can sign transactions and connect to dApps without our server.
recovery.bannerWarning: Move your funds to a new wallet after recovery.
recovery.bannerKeep: Keep your key files stored safely

send.title: Send {{symbol}}
send.restoreFromBackup: To restore from a server backup, go to Backup & Recovery.
send.enterPassphraseKey: Enter your passphrase to unlock this key share
send.rbfDesc: Re-signing with higher fee to replace stuck tx. Same inputs, same recipient.
send.backupRequiredDesc: Complete your key backup first in Backup & Recovery.
send.xlmDestNotActive: Destination account is not activated. Send XLM first to activate it.
send.gasEstFailed: Gas estimation failed — transaction may revert
send.tooManyInputs: Too many inputs ({{count}}). Maximum {{max}} UTXOs per transaction.
send.unlimitedApproval: dApp requested unlimited approval. Consider setting a specific amount.
send.backupGateDesc: Go to Backup & Recovery to backup your key before sending large amounts.
send.checkActivityLog: Check Activity Log in the Advanced menu for details.
send.fraudFlagDesc: This address has been flagged for: {{flags}}. The transaction will be rejected by your policy.
send.policyBlockedDefault: This transaction does not match any allow rule in your policy.
send.gasLimitBelowEstimate: Gas limit {{limit}} is below estimated {{estimate}}. Transaction may fail.
send.maxFeeBelowNetwork: Max fee {{fee}} Gwei is below network minimum (~{{min}} Gwei). Transaction may not be confirmed.
send.passkeySessionExpired: Passkey session expired. Please try again.
send.passkeyNoEncryption: Passkey does not support encryption. Use file upload.

sign.title: Raw Signing
sign.desc: Sign arbitrary messages with your key share and verify the result.
sign.passkeyExpired: Passkey session expired. Please try again.

wc.title: WalletConnect
wc.desc: Connect your accounts to dApps. Signing requests will appear here for your approval.
wc.notConfigured: WalletConnect is not configured. Set VITE_WC_PROJECT_ID environment variable.
wc.invalidQr: Invalid QR code — expected a WalletConnect URI
wc.cameraAccessDenied: Camera access denied — check your browser/device settings
wc.noCamera: No camera found on this device
wc.noSessionsDesc: Paste a WalletConnect URI from a dApp to connect.
wc.restoreFromBackup: To restore from a server backup, go to Backup & Recovery.
wc.enterPassphraseKey: Enter your passphrase to unlock this key share
wc.passkeyNoEncrypt: Passkey does not support encryption. Use file upload.
wc.unlimitedApproval: dApp requested unlimited approval. Consider setting a specific amount.
wc.passkeyExpired: Passkey session expired. Please try again.

broadcast.title: Broadcast Transaction
broadcast.desc: Broadcast a raw signed transaction to the network.

xlm.selectToken: Select a token to enable on your Stellar account.
xlm.canReceive: You can now receive {{symbol}} on Stellar

algo.selectToken: Select a token to opt into on your Algorand account.
algo.optInDescription: Opt in to receive this ASA

account.failedRetry: Failed to load. Tap to retry.

tokenDetail.tapSendOrReceive: Tap Send or Receive to get started
tokenDetail.fundItDesc: Fund it to get started — send crypto from an exchange or another wallet.
tokenDetail.tapToGetStarted: Tap Send to transfer funds, or Receive to get your address.
tokenDetail.walletAddressTooltip: Your wallet address — share it to receive funds

createAccount.keySplitDesc: Your key is split between this device and our server — neither can sign alone

manageDisplay.description: Show or hide tokens. Hidden tokens won't appear in your wallet.

passkey.title: Passkeys
passkey.description: Manage passkeys used to encrypt your key share.
passkey.addFirst: Add a passkey to protect your key share with biometrics or PIN.

gate.title: Passkey Required
gate.desc: Use your passkey to authorize this action.

keyShare.browserStorageDesc: Your client key share (1 of 2) is encrypted and stored in this browser only. It never leaves your device.
keyShare.lostAccessHint: Lost access? Restore from a backup file or server escrow.
keyShare.lostAccessHintStandalone: Lost access? Restore from your downloaded backup file.
keyShare.noShares: No key shares stored in this browser
keyShare.noSharesHint: Save a key share during account creation or import one here.
keyShare.serverBackupDesc: An encrypted copy of your client key share is stored on the server as a recovery backup. The server cannot read it — only you can decrypt it with your passphrase.
keyShare.serverBackupHint: Download it to restore signing access if you lose this browser's storage.
keyShare.serverKeyDesc: The server holds its key share (2 of 2) to co-sign transactions. Under normal operation, you do not need to download it.
keyShare.serverKeyWarning: Only download this if you need to recover your wallet without our service. Holding both shares removes the security benefit of two-party signing.
keyShare.selfCustodyExplain: You hold both key shares and can recover your wallet without our server.
keyShare.hkdfExplain: You downloaded a copy of the server's key. It's encrypted — contact kexify support to decrypt it in an emergency.
keyShare.escrowExplain: Your client key is escrowed on our server. Restore it on any device using your passphrase.
keyShare.exportSuccess: Server share exported. Store it safely.
keyShare.downloadChoice: Choose how you want to download the server's key share.
keyShare.safeBackupDesc: Encrypted by the server. You keep a backup copy, but cannot decrypt it on your own. In an emergency, contact kexify support to get the decryption key.
keyShare.fullSelfCustodyDesc: Decrypted and re-encrypted with your passphrase. You hold both key shares and no longer depend on us. Use this only if you understand the security implications.
keyShare.tip1: Never share your key file or passphrase with anyone
keyShare.tip2: Store backups in a secure offline location (USB drive, safe)
keyShare.tip3: Anyone with both key shares can access your funds
keyShare.tip4: kexify will never ask for your passphrase or key file
keyShare.removeWarning: This key share is not backed up on the server. Removing it without a backup file means you will permanently lose access to this account.
keyShare.removeDesc: {{name}} will be removed from this browser. You can re-import it later from a backup file or server backup.
keyShare.removeConfirmCheck: I have a backup file or server backup enabled for this key
keyShare.passphrasePrompt: Choose a passphrase to encrypt this file. You will need it to use the file later. There is no way to recover a forgotten passphrase.
keyShare.enterCreationPassphrase: Enter the passphrase you chose when this key was created.
keyShare.decryptedChoose: Key share {{id}}... decrypted. Choose how to protect it in this browser.
keyShare.enterFilePassphrase: Enter the passphrase you used to encrypt this file.
keyShare.alreadyStored: This key share is already stored in the browser
keyShare.couldNotParse: Could not parse key share file
keyShare.prfNotSupported: Passkey PRF not supported — cannot decrypt this backup
keyShare.decryptFailed: Failed to decrypt backup — passkey may not match

recovery.banner: Recovery mode — your wallet keys are loaded in this browser
recovery.bannerDesc: Your two key files have been combined and loaded locally. You can sign transactions and connect to dApps without our server.
recovery.bannerWarning: Move your funds to a new wallet after recovery.
recovery.bannerKeep: Keep your key files stored safely
recovery.title: Backup & Recovery
recovery.moveFunds: Move funds to a new wallet
recovery.recoveryDesc: Load your two key files to recover your wallet.
recovery.description: Keep your wallet safe. Complete these steps so you can recover your accounts if needed.
recovery.allSetDesc: You can recover all your accounts even if you lose access to this device or our server goes down.
recovery.incompleteDesc: Complete the checklist below to ensure you can always recover your wallet.
recovery.browserDetail: Your key is encrypted and stored locally so you can sign transactions.
recovery.escrowDetail: An encrypted copy of your key is stored on our server. You can restore it on any device.
recovery.serverDetailSelfCustody: You hold a self-custody copy of the server's key share.
recovery.serverDetailHkdf: You have a server-encrypted backup. Contact kexify support to decrypt it in an emergency.
recovery.serverDetailDownload: Download a backup of the server's key share. It's encrypted by the server — in an emergency, contact us to decrypt it.
recovery.setPassphraseForDownload: Set a passphrase to protect the downloaded file:
recovery.keyFileDifferentAccount: This key file belongs to a different account
recovery.couldNotParseKeyFile: Could not parse key share file
recovery.fullSelfCustodyExpert: For full self-custody, use Expert mode in Config.
recovery.getBothKeyFilesDesc: You need your key file and the server key file. Both should be saved as .json files.
recovery.openRecoveryPageDesc: Go to {{url}} and load both files. The app works offline — no server needed.
recovery.moveFundsDesc: Once in recovery mode, send your funds to a new wallet for best security. You can also use WalletConnect to interact with any dApp.
recovery.sourceCodeDesc: Source code (in case app is unavailable)
recovery.publicKeysMismatch: Public keys do not match — these shares belong to different keys
recovery.eddsaKeysMismatch: EdDSA public keys do not match — these shares belong to different keys
recovery.couldNotParseJson: Could not parse file as JSON

freeze.title: Freeze Account
freeze.description: Temporarily freeze your account to prevent any transactions.
freeze.mayTakeSeconds: This may take a few seconds
freeze.frozenDescription: Your account is now frozen. No transactions can be made.
freeze.freezeTooltip: Freeze your account — blocks all operations immediately
freeze.unfreezePasskeyDesc: Verify with your passkey to schedule an unfreeze. Your account will unfreeze after 24 hours.
freeze.cancelUnfreezePasskeyDesc: Verify with your passkey to cancel the scheduled unfreeze. Your account will remain frozen.

backup.backUpDesc: Save your key share to recover your wallet if you lose access to this browser.

activity.title: Activity Log
activity.description: A full history of all operations performed with your wallet.
activity.noActivityDesc: Operations performed with your wallet will appear here.
activity.accountCreatedDetail: A new account was set up successfully.
activity.backupSavedDetail: Your encrypted key backup was uploaded.
activity.backupDownloadedDetail: Your encrypted key backup was downloaded.
activity.serverShareDownloadedDetail: The server's key share was exported with encryption.
activity.selfCustodyExportDetail: The server's key share was exported. You now have full self-custody.
activity.blockedDisabledDetail: This transaction was rejected because your account is disabled. You can re-enable it in account settings.
activity.blockedUnauthorizedDetail: Someone tried to sign with your key from a different account.
activity.blockedInvalidDetail: The transaction data didn't match its hash. This could indicate tampering.
activity.blockedUnsupportedDetail: The token being transferred is not supported by this wallet.
activity.blockedRiskyDetail: The recipient address {{address}} was flagged for: {{flags}}. This is based on your fraud check setting ({{level}}).
activity.blockedNoRuleDetail: No policy rule matched this transaction. By default, unmatched transactions are blocked. You can add a rule in Policy Rules settings.
activity.blockedPolicyDetail: Your policy rule #{{priority}} blocked this transaction. You can adjust your rules in Policy Rules settings.

walletActivity.activityAcrossChains: Activity across all your chains will appear here

addressBook.title: Address Book
addressBook.saveAddressesWhenSending: Save addresses when sending to quickly find them here.

policy.noRulesAllBlockedActive: No active rules — all transactions blocked
policy.withoutRulesBlocked: Without rules, all transactions are blocked.
policy.firstMatchWinsFooter: Rules are evaluated top to bottom. First match wins.
policy.noRulesSigningBlocked: No rules — all signing blocked by default
policy.withoutRulesSigningBlocked: Without rules, all signing requests are blocked by default
policy.firstMatchNoMatch: First match wins. No match = blocked.
policy.assetRequired: Asset is required when max amount is set

standalone.title: Anonymous Wallet
standalone.setPassphrase: Set a passphrase to encrypt your key share
standalone.backupDesc: This file is the ONLY way to recover your wallet if you lose access. No email recovery available.
standalone.prfUnlockHint: Tap your passkey to unlock this wallet
standalone.enterPassphraseToImport: Enter your passphrase to decrypt and import this wallet
standalone.confirmDelete: This will remove the wallet from this browser. You'll need your backup file to recover it.
standalone.passkeyDesc: You'll be prompted twice: first to create the passkey, then to verify it. This passkey is required for signing transactions — without it, no one can move your funds.
